title: 2026 Grammy Award Predictions from RANGE
text: RANGE magazine's predictions examine this year's Grammy nominations across major categories, noting that "the field feels like a brisk walk through every corner of the musical village." Album of the Year Will Win: Kendrick Lamar's GNX. Should Win: Lady Gaga's MAYHEM. The piece observes that while Kendrick's album is "a sprawling, unflinching meditation on legacy," Gaga's record "truly embodies the restless, inventive spirit" the category should recognize. Record of the Year Will Win: ROSÉ & Bruno Mars' "APT.". Should Win: Lady Gaga's "Abracadabra". The author notes the category "reliably mistakes saturation for inevitability." Best New Artist Will Win: Olivia Dean. Should Win: Addison Rae. The piece critiques how "virality, social-media clout, and sheer momentum" now compete with traditional gatekeeping in this category. Notable Theme: The article repeatedly highlights significant omissions, particularly Lorde's Virgin album, emphasizing how "the Grammys still struggle to balance taste, influence, and sheer audacity."
